title: MailerLite vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
intro: MailerLite and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. If you're deciding between them, understanding their strengths, pricing, and ideal user base will help you make the right choice for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Ease of use, affordability, landing pages

choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a limited budget
You want an easy-to-use platform with drag-and-drop features and landing pages
You prefer a lower entry price point with a generous free tier
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced features like predictive analytics and SMS marketing
You're willing to pay more for specialized e-commerce marketing tools

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. MailerLite excels for small businesses seeking affordability and simplicity, while Klaviyo is purpose-built for e-commerce brands needing advanced automation and analytics. MailerLite has better Trustpilot ratings (4.5 vs 3.8), while both share the same G2 score of 4.6.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Klaviyo?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. MailerLite also offers a more generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500, making it the clear winner for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber lists and campaigns between platforms. Both tools support standard data export formats, though you may need to manually recreate complex automation workflows. It's recommended to plan the migration carefully to avoid losing subscriber data or breaking active campaigns.
